items.q: Conditionals: «If I were rich, I ___ travel.» (тип 2)
items.h: Type 2: If + Past Simple → would + V1 (нереальное условие)
items.ex: Правильный ответ: would. Type 2: If + Past Simple → would + V1 (нереальное условие).

items.subject: english
items.q: Which phrase sounds natural when you express preference?
items.a: I'd prefer the first option because it feels more practical.
o: I'd prefer the first option because it feels more practical.
I liking first picture because yes.
The best variant is all variants at once.
I choose nothing because it is impossible.
items.h: Give a choice and one clear reason.
items.ex: Правильный ответ: I'd prefer the first option because it feels more practical.. Give a choice and one clear reason.
criteria: 1 балл только при выборе всех верных вариантов.
